tools.name: list_catalog
tools.description: List Central Command x402 catalog endpoints with pricing. No body required.

tools.name: agent_strategy
tools.description: Central Command agent console. Body.action examples: guide, whoami, connect_strategy, create_strategy, deploy, execute (force_paper), backtest, portfolio, results. Paper by default; live orders need confirm_live.

tools.name: cc_squirrel_chat_v2
tools.description: Autonomous Trading Agent: Full AI trading assistant powered by GPT that can analyze markets, compute indicators, fetch live data, place orders, manage positions, and provide strategic advice. Price: $0.03 USDC.

tools.name: cc_openclaw_chat
tools.description: OpenClaw Strategy Agent: Autonomous AI agent specialized in strategy development, backtesting, and continuous market monitoring. Uses indicator libraries, pattern recognition, and instrument specifications. Price: $0.025 USDC.

tools.name: cc_trade_builder
tools.description: AI Trade Constructor: Takes natural language or structured trade ideas, fetches live market context, and generates fully executable order parameters with AI reasoning. Price: $0.02 USDC.

tools.name: cc_twap_executor
tools.description: TWAP Order Executor: Time-Weighted Average Price execution engine — splits large orders into smaller randomized slices over configurable time windows to minimize market impact. Price: $0.015 USDC.

tools.name: cc_blofin_public
tools.description: BloFin Public Market Data: Proxy to BloFin public API (tickers, instruments, orderbook, trades, candles) bypassing CORS restrictions. Price: $0.0005 USDC.

tools.name: cc_liquidation_max_pain
tools.description: Max Pain Liquidation Levels: Identifies the exact price levels where maximum liquidation cascades would trigger for both longs and shorts. Price: $0.003 USDC.

tools.name: cc_fear_greed
tools.description: Crypto Fear & Greed Index: Crypto market Fear & Greed composite index (0-100) with historical values and trend direction. 30-min cache. Price: $0.0005 USDC.

tools.name: cc_etf_flows
tools.description: Bitcoin ETF Flow Tracker: Real-time Bitcoin/crypto ETF inflow and outflow data tracking institutional positioning (GBTC, IBIT, FBTC, etc). 60-min cache. Price: $0.002 USDC.

tools.name: cc_economic_calendar
tools.description: Macroeconomic Event Calendar: Upcoming high-impact macroeconomic events (CPI, FOMC, NFP, etc.) with forecast vs previous values. 60-min cache. Price: $0.001 USDC.

tools.name: cc_cme_gap
tools.description: CME Futures Gap Detector: Detects and tracks CME Bitcoin futures gaps (Friday close vs Monday open) with fill status monitoring. Unique signal. Price: $0.002 USDC.

tools.name: cc_traditional_markets
tools.description: Traditional Markets Dashboard: Live quotes for S&P 500, Nasdaq, Dow, VIX, Gold, Oil, US Bonds, DXY, and major forex pairs. 15-min cache. Price: $0.001 USDC.

tools.name: cc_hyperliquid_data
tools.description: Hyperliquid Whale Intelligence: Whale positions and activity alerts from Hyperliquid DEX showing large trader positioning. 30-min cache. Price: $0.003 USDC.

tools.name: cc_market_news
tools.description: AI-Curated Market News: Aggregated crypto and macro market news from multiple sources with relevance scoring and categorization. Price: $0.002 USDC.

tools.name: cc_ma_fetch
tools.description: Moving Average Data: Multi-period moving average values (SMA/EMA at various lengths) via Coinglass with 30-min cache. Price: $0.001 USDC.

tools.name: cc_coinglass_data
tools.description: Aggregated Derivatives Intelligence: Comprehensive Coinglass derivatives data including open interest, liquidations, funding rates, and long/short ratios with 45-min caching and gzip compression. Price: $0.003 USDC.

tools.name: cc_coinglass_footprint
tools.description: Orderflow Footprint Data: Fetches footprint/orderflow data showing buy vs sell volume imbalance at each price level. 5-minute cache. Price: $0.005 USDC.

tools.name: cc_funding_rates
tools.description: Perpetual Funding Rates: Current and predicted perpetual futures funding rates across all major exchanges via Coinglass with 30-min cache. Price: $0.001 USDC.

tools.name: cc_open_interest
tools.description: Aggregated Open Interest: Historical and current aggregated open interest across all major exchanges with 30-min cache. Price: $0.001 USDC.

tools.name: cc_long_short_account_ratio
tools.description: Long/Short Account Ratio: Global long vs short account positioning ratio from Coinglass showing retail sentiment with 60-min cache. Price: $0.001 USDC.

tools.name: cc_liquidation_heatmap
tools.description: Liquidation Heatmap: Liquidation cluster visualization data showing where leveraged positions would be force-closed at each price level. Price: $0.005 USDC.

tools.name: cc_asset_scanner
tools.description: Multi-Asset Technical Scanner: Scans 36 major crypto assets across BTC, ETH, SOL, alts, and memes for multi-timeframe technical signals including RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, ATR, and composite scores. Price: $0.002 USDC.

tools.name: cc_cfe_risk_monitor
tools.description: Real-Time Risk Monitor: Checks portfolio risk in real-time: drawdown limits (-5%), daily loss caps (-$500), position count limits, and volatility regime awareness. Price: $0.005 USDC.

tools.name: cc_cfe_engine
tools.description: Counter-Fade Engine: Proprietary algorithm that identifies statistically proven bad traders (t-stat < -2.0) and generates inverse signals. Fade the crowd with mathematical edge. Price: $0.01 USDC.

tools.name: cc_cohort_fade_scanner
tools.description: Fadeable Cohort Scanner: Identifies entire cohorts of consistently underperforming traders whose positions can be faded for alpha. 15-min refresh. Price: $0.008 USDC.

tools.name: cc_counter_trade_rankings
tools.description: Inverse Alpha Leaderboard: Ranks all tracked traders by inverse performance — worst performers are best fade targets. Updated from live exchange data. Price: $0.005 USDC.

tools.name: cc_counter_trade_monitor
tools.description: Counter-Trade Position Monitor: Real-time monitoring of ranked counter-trade targets live positions on BloFin. Detects new entries for immediate fading. Price: $0.008 USDC.

tools.name: cc_central_signal
tools.description: Universal Signal Router: Unified signal ingestion endpoint that normalizes symbols from any exchange format (Binance, Bybit, TradingView) to executable format and routes to execution. Price: $0.01 USDC.

tools.name: cc_external_signal
tools.description: External Signal Webhook: Public-facing webhook endpoint for TradingView alerts, custom bots, and third-party signal providers. Normalizes and forwards to execution. Price: $0.005 USDC.

tools.name: cc_data_tools
tools.description: Technical Analysis Toolbox: Comprehensive TA computation engine: 25+ indicators (SMA, EMA, RSI, MACD, ATR, Bollinger, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Ichimoku, VWAP, Volume Profile, Fibonacci, Pivots, etc.) on any OHLCV data. Price: $0.005 USDC.

tools.name: cc_auto_fetch_market_data
tools.description: Comprehensive Market Context: All-in-one market intelligence: OHLCV candles + computed indicators + Coinglass OI + news via Tavily. Everything an agent needs in one call. Price: $0.008 USDC.

tools.name: cc_indicator_generator
tools.description: AI Indicator Creator: Generates production-ready JavaScript chart indicator code from natural language descriptions. Outputs runnable indicator functions with parameters, overlays, and visualization config. Price: $0.02 USDC.

tools.name: cc_strategy_data_parser
tools.description: Strategy Language Parser: Parses natural language strategy descriptions into structured executable specifications: timeframes, indicators, patterns, risk parameters, and entry/exit rules. Price: $0.01 USDC.

tools.name: cc_strategy_backtest
tools.description: AI Strategy Backtester: Takes a natural language strategy description, generates executable code, and runs it against historical OHLCV data with full TP/SL/trailing stop simulation. Price: $0.05 USDC.

tools.name: cc_wallet_browser_proxy
tools.description: Multi-Chain EVM RPC Gateway: Multi-chain EVM RPC forwarder supporting Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, and BSC. One endpoint, six chains. Price: $0.001 USDC.

tools.name: cc_solana_rpc
tools.description: Solana Multi-RPC Proxy: Multi-endpoint Solana RPC proxy with automatic failover (Alchemy, public, Ankr) for any JSON-RPC method. Reliable Solana access. Price: $0.001 USDC.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: cc_squirrel_chat_v2 · Private data: cc_wallet_browser_proxy · Public sink: cc_external_signal · Destructive: agent_strategy, cc_central_signal.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: cc_squirrel_chat_v2 · Private data: cc_wallet_browser_proxy · Public sink: cc_external_signal · Destructive: agent_strategy, cc_central_signal

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
